title: Senior Backend Engineer
summary: We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale the services behind our payments platform. You will own critical systems end-to-end: API design, data modeling, performance, and reliability. You will work with product and infrastructure teams to ship features used by millions of customers.
required_skills: Python or Go in production at scale
Relational databases (PostgreSQL or MySQL): schema design, query optimization
Designing and operating REST or gRPC APIs
Distributed systems fundamentals: queues, caching, idempotency, retries
Testing discipline: unit, integration, and load testing
nice_to_have: Experience in payments, fintech, or other correctness-critical domains
responsibilities: Design, build, and operate backend services for payment processing
Lead technical design reviews and mentor mid-level engineers
Drive reliability improvements: SLOs, incident response, capacity planning
Collaborate with product managers to scope and deliver features
